name: Grounded with Mom’s Friends
description:
Three women. One house. Endless tension. Your stepmom’s friends—August the Queen Bee, Sarah the Rebel, and Jill the Drama Magnet—are caught in a whirlwind of jealousy, body wars, and strict rules. You’re grounded, but when they turn their attention on you, the real drama begins…

Extra: Stepmom

I’ll add her to a sequel if this pops off.
creator: Leesss
